ratio_source_quote: SVS-GPZ BM, in molar ratios of 2:1 and 1:1; 'Ball milling was performed by placing crystalline SVS and GPZ in the appropriate molar ratios (total mass 500 mg) into each milling chamber'.
process_details: Oscillatory ball mill (Mixer Mill MM301, Retsch GmbH & Co., Haan, Germany). 500 mg total mass per chamber with three 9 mm stainless steel balls; 30 Hz for 110 min at ambient conditions. Stored over phosphorous pentoxide at -20 °C until use.
detection_methods: XRPD (X'Pert PRO MPD, Cu Kα, 5-35° 2θ); DSC (TA-DSC Q100, 10 K/min, single Tg confirms single-phase amorphous mixture); FTIR (Varian 3100 ATR).
source_quote: SVS–GPZ BM 2:1 and 1:1 mixtures remained amorphous for over 4 months when stored at 4 °C/0% RH ... SVS–GPZ 2:1 BM 128/133 [XRPD/FTIR detection day].
notes: Storage at 4 °C/0% RH (P2O5 desiccator). XRPD detected onset at day 128, FTIR at day 133. Authors found NO molecular SVS-GPZ interactions (FTIR + PCA); stability attributed to GPZ acting as anti-plasticizer (higher Tg of GPZ pulls mixture Tg up). Flory-Huggins χ(298 K) = 5.5 ± 2.0 (predicts immiscibility, but milling forced single-phase). Negative deviation from Gordon-Taylor predicted Tg (≈1 °C) supports lack of strong heterogeneous H-bonding.
review_reasons: Protokolla 4 °C / 0% RH (P2O5-desikkaattori), 128 d — ei sovi ICH-luokituksiin (kuiva mutta seuranta-aika >>30 vrk, ei dry_short_term); merkitty non_standard
XRPD/FTIR poikkeavat hieman (128 vs 133 d); käytetty XRPD bulk-kiteytymisen indikaattorina

process_details: Oscillatory ball mill (Mixer Mill MM301, Retsch); 500 mg total mass; three 9 mm stainless steel balls; 30 Hz for 110 min at ambient conditions.
source_quote: onset of recrystallization was observed at 44 and 52 days when stored at 25 °C/0% RH by XRPD with 2:1 and 1:1 mixtures, respectively. However, FTIR suggested that recrystallization might have started even earlier, at 14 days (2:1 mixture).
notes: Storage at 25 °C/0% RH (P2O5). XRPD onset day 44; FTIR detected onset much earlier (day 14) — surface vs bulk effect (ATR penetration ≈2 µm). Used XRPD as bulk-crystallinity indicator.
review_reasons: Protokolla 25 °C / 0% RH (P2O5), 44 d — ei sovi standardiin (RH=0%, ei dry_short_term koska >30 vrk); merkitty non_standard
FTIR ja XRPD erivat merkittavasti (14 vrk vs 44 vrk); kerätty XRPD-arvo voi olla aliarvio bulk-kiteytymisen alkamisesta

process_details: Oscillatory ball mill (Mixer Mill MM301, Retsch); 500 mg total mass; three 9 mm stainless steel balls; 30 Hz for 110 min at ambient conditions.
source_quote: At 25 °C/60% RH, the onset of recrystallization was found to be fast (detected at 8 and at 16 days for 2:1 and 1:1-mixtures respectively). Again, FTIR showed that recrystallization occurred already within two days in these conditions.
notes: Storage at 25 °C/60% RH (saturated NaBr) — matches ICH Q1A long-term protocol. XRPD onset day 8; FTIR detected onset already at day 2.

process_details: Oscillatory ball mill (Mixer Mill MM301, Retsch); 500 mg total mass; three 9 mm stainless steel balls; 30 Hz for 110 min at ambient conditions.
detection_methods: XRPD; DSC (single Tg confirms single-phase amorphous mixture); FTIR.
source_quote: SVS–GPZ BM 2:1 and 1:1 mixtures remained amorphous for over 4 months when stored at 4 °C/0% RH ... SVS–GPZ 1:1 BM 128/139.
notes: Storage at 4 °C/0% RH (P2O5). XRPD detected onset day 128, FTIR day 139. Tg = 46.3 ± 6.6 °C (single Tg, single-phase). Theoretical Gordon-Taylor Tg = 48.4 °C — negative deviation ≈2 °C.
review_reasons: Protokolla 4 °C / 0% RH (P2O5), 128 d — ei sovi ICH-luokituksiin; merkitty non_standard

process_details: Oscillatory ball mill (Mixer Mill MM301, Retsch); 500 mg total mass; three 9 mm stainless steel balls; 30 Hz for 110 min at ambient conditions.
source_quote: onset of recrystallization was observed at 44 and 52 days when stored at 25 °C/0% RH by XRPD with 2:1 and 1:1 mixtures, respectively ... at 35 days (1:1 mixture) [FTIR].
notes: Storage at 25 °C/0% RH (P2O5). XRPD onset day 52; FTIR onset day 35 (surface earlier than bulk).
review_reasons: Protokolla 25 °C / 0% RH (P2O5) ei sovi standardiin (RH=0%, >30 vrk); FTIR ja XRPD erivat (35 vrk vs 52 vrk)

process_details: Oscillatory ball mill (Mixer Mill MM301, Retsch); 500 mg total mass; three 9 mm stainless steel balls; 30 Hz for 110 min at ambient conditions.
source_quote: At 25 °C/60% RH, the onset of recrystallization was found to be fast (detected at 8 and at 16 days for 2:1 and 1:1-mixtures respectively) ... FTIR showed that recrystallization occurred already within two days in these conditions.
notes: Storage at 25 °C/60% RH (saturated NaBr) — matches ICH Q1A long-term. XRPD onset day 16; FTIR onset day 8.

process_details: Oscillatory ball mill (Mixer Mill MM301, Retsch) placed in cold room (+4 °C). 500 mg total mass with three 9 mm stainless steel balls per chamber; 30 Hz for 60 min. Chambers immersed in liquid nitrogen for 2 min prior to milling and at 10 min intervals during milling to ensure cryogenic conditions. Allowed to reach ambient T in P2O5 desiccator before opening.
detection_methods: XRPD; DSC (single Tg confirms single-phase amorphous mixture); FTIR.
source_quote: At 4 °C/0% RH, the 2:1 co-amorphous mixture was found to be stable for over 2 months ... SVS–GPZ 2:1 CM 74/79.
notes: Storage at 4 °C/0% RH (P2O5). XRPD onset day 74; FTIR onset day 79. Tg = 41.5 ± 5.1 °C; Tg of 2:1 CM identical to 2:1 BM within error — milling method did not affect Tg or FTIR spectra.
review_reasons: Protokolla 4 °C / 0% RH (P2O5), 74 d — ei sovi ICH-luokituksiin; merkitty non_standard

process_details: Oscillatory ball mill (Mixer Mill MM301, Retsch) placed in cold room (+4 °C); 500 mg total mass; three 9 mm stainless steel balls; 30 Hz for 60 min; LN2 immersion 2 min prior and at 10 min intervals.
source_quote: the 2:1 CM mixture was much more stable in all conditions. Peaks started to appear at 53 and 46 days at 25 °C/0% RH and 25 °C/60% RH, respectively. FTIR measurements confirmed the onset of crystallization at 58 and 46 days in these conditions.
notes: Storage at 25 °C/0% RH (P2O5). XRPD onset day 53; FTIR onset day 58. CM 2:1 was much more stable than BM 2:1 at 25 °C (53 d vs 44 d for XRPD).
review_reasons: Protokolla 25 °C / 0% RH (P2O5) ei sovi standardiin (RH=0%, >30 vrk seuranta); merkitty non_standard

process_details: Oscillatory ball mill (MM301) in cold room (+4 °C); 500 mg total mass; three 9 mm steel balls; 30 Hz, 60 min; LN2 immersion 2 min prior and at 10 min intervals.
source_quote: Peaks started to appear at 53 and 46 days at 25 °C/0% RH and 25 °C/60% RH, respectively. FTIR measurements confirmed the onset of crystallization at 58 and 46 days in these conditions.
notes: Storage at 25 °C/60% RH (saturated NaBr) — ICH Q1A long-term protocol. XRPD and FTIR both at day 46 (consistent).

process_details: Oscillatory ball mill (MM301) in cold room (+4 °C); 500 mg total mass; three 9 mm steel balls; 30 Hz, 60 min; LN2 immersion 2 min prior and at 10 min intervals.
detection_methods: XRPD; DSC (single Tg confirms single-phase amorphous mixture); FTIR.
source_quote: 1:1 CM mixtures were found to be stable for over 2 months in all conditions ... SVS–GPZ 1:1 CM 88/85.
notes: Storage at 4 °C/0% RH (P2O5). XRPD onset day 88; FTIR onset day 85. Tg = 46.7 ± 5.2 °C, identical to 1:1 BM within error.
review_reasons: Protokolla 4 °C / 0% RH (P2O5), 88 d — ei sovi ICH-luokituksiin; merkitty non_standard

process_details: Oscillatory ball mill (MM301) in cold room (+4 °C); 500 mg total mass; three 9 mm steel balls; 30 Hz, 60 min; LN2 immersion 2 min prior and at 10 min intervals.
source_quote: 1:1 CM mixtures were found to be stable for over 2 months in all conditions ... SVS–GPZ 1:1 CM 74/79 [25 °C/0% RH].
notes: Storage at 25 °C/0% RH (P2O5). XRPD onset day 74; FTIR onset day 79.
review_reasons: Protokolla 25 °C / 0% RH (P2O5) ei sovi standardiin (RH=0%, >30 vrk seuranta); merkitty non_standard

process_details: Oscillatory ball mill (MM301) in cold room (+4 °C); 500 mg total mass; three 9 mm steel balls; 30 Hz, 60 min; LN2 immersion 2 min prior and at 10 min intervals.
source_quote: 1:1 CM mixtures were found to be stable for over 2 months in all conditions ... SVS–GPZ 1:1 CM 74/65 [25 °C/60% RH].
notes: Storage at 25 °C/60% RH (saturated NaBr) — ICH Q1A long-term. XRPD onset day 74; FTIR onset day 65. Notable: 1:1 CM at 60% RH stable >2 months while 1:1 APM crystallized within 3 days at same RH — strong evidence that molecular-level mixing (single phase) outperforms physical mixing of pre-amorphized drugs against humidity.

ratio_source_quote: SVS-GPZ CM 1:2 molar ratio; cryo-milled. (Ball-milled 1:2 retained crystallinity — not co-amorphous; only CM produced fully amorphous 1:2.)
process_details: Oscillatory ball mill (MM301) in cold room (+4 °C); 500 mg total mass; three 9 mm steel balls; 30 Hz, 60 min; LN2 immersion 2 min prior and at 10 min intervals. Note: ball milling alone did not amorphize 1:2 (residual GPZ peaks); cryomilling was required.
detection_methods: XRPD; DSC (single Tg confirms single-phase amorphous mixture); FTIR.
source_quote: the 1:2 co-amorphous mixtures were found to be stable for over 2 months in all conditions. FTIR and XRPD both showed that when stored at 4 °C/0% RH, the 1:2 SVS–GPZ CM mixture was stable for approx. 90 days.
notes: Storage at 4 °C/0% RH (P2O5). XRPD onset day 95; FTIR day 92. 1:2 CM is the most stable mixture in this study (highest GPZ content → highest Tg = 53.6 °C). Authors emphasize stabilization is bulk-Tg / anti-plasticizer driven (NOT specific intermolecular interactions, which were ruled out by FTIR/PCA/Flory-Huggins).
review_reasons: Protokolla 4 °C / 0% RH (P2O5), 95 d — ei sovi ICH-luokituksiin; merkitty non_standard

process_details: Oscillatory ball mill (MM301) in cold room (+4 °C); 500 mg total mass; three 9 mm steel balls; 30 Hz, 60 min; LN2 immersion 2 min prior and at 10 min intervals.
source_quote: FTIR and XRPD indicated that, when stored at 25 °C/0% RH, 1:2 SVS–GPZ CM started to recrystallize after approx. 70 days of storage ... SVS–GPZ 1:2 CM 74/72.
notes: Storage at 25 °C/0% RH (P2O5). XRPD onset day 74; FTIR day 72.
review_reasons: Protokolla 25 °C / 0% RH (P2O5) ei sovi standardiin (RH=0%, >30 vrk seuranta); merkitty non_standard

process_details: Oscillatory ball mill (MM301) in cold room (+4 °C); 500 mg total mass; three 9 mm steel balls; 30 Hz, 60 min; LN2 immersion 2 min prior and at 10 min intervals.
source_quote: when stored at 25 °C/60% RH, onset of recrystallization was detected by XRPD after 74 days of storage, but FTIR indicated changes occurring already after 58 days of storage.
notes: Storage at 25 °C/60% RH (saturated NaBr) — ICH Q1A long-term. XRPD onset day 74; FTIR onset day 58. 1:2 CM remained stable >2 months even at 60% RH — the most stable composition in the study, attributable to highest Tg (53.6 °C) from highest GPZ (anti-plasticizer) content.
